title: beckera dioica
intro: Beckera dioica, also known as the mountain mint, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Beckera dioica include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Beckera dioica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
